title: ぶちかませ！お姫様ロード！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, I'm visiting a chapel to help out with a
school-sponsored photo shoot.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh, what a gorgeous chapel! I feel like I could
meet a prince here!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You have such a one-track mind... Though I have
to agree, this place isn't half bad.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
In any case, we're here as volunteers. Don't get
distracted.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but of course! I'll make sure to work hard
enough to earn my chance at meeting a prince!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
You're helping out too, correct? It's wonderful to
have a trainer on the team! Welcome!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And with that, the event begins. However...

text_block_list.name: Cameraman
text_block_list.text:
This'll make for some great shots! Be a dear and
pose a little!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I already said no! Stop pointing the camera at me!

text_block_list.name: Cameraman
text_block_list.text:
Oh, don't be like that! I need you to model for
me! Please!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...What's this? I hear an ill-mannered voice.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Yes, it's that cameraman. He's ignoring all the
rules.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Then I shall have to intervene. I'll save you,
Dober!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? Wait, Kawakami!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: HYAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: BAM!

text_block_list.name: Cameraman
text_block_list.text:
Holy crap! Why is there a huge hole in the
ground?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
You there! Stop harassing Dober, or I'll knock you
into next week!

text_block_list.name: Cameraman
text_block_list.text:
What are you talking about?! You almost hit me
when yo—

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: SILENCE! The price for angering a lady is steep!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: If you do not cease this instant, well...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: CRRRRACK!

text_block_list.name: Cameraman
text_block_list.text: Eek! I-I'm sorry! I'll be going nowwww!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The photographer flees the scene at the sight of
Kawakami Princess's righteous might.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...Thanks, Kawakami. If only I'd set clearer
boundaries from the start...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
No, you didn't do anything wrong, Dober. I'll
always be here if you ever need me! ♪

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Okay, now, where were we? Right! Back to work
so I can meet my prince!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
So you can meet your prince, huh? Admirable,
but I don't think how you meet will matter all that
much.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Oh? What do you mean by that, I wonder?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Well, now. If you're curious, why not ask that
trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Based on seeing what Kawakami Princess did just
now, I believe...
choice_data_list: Your prince will be the one to find you.
You may just become a prince yourself.
You may just become a prince yourself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Based on seeing what Kawakami Princess did just
now, I believe...
choice_data_list: Your prince will be the one to find you.
You may just become a prince yourself.
You may just become a prince yourself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell Kawakami Princess that her many wonderful
and unique quirks will have princes flocking her
way.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Wow, really?! My charm will attract my suitor?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
But what quirks do I have? I wish to hear more,
King!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Um, quirks? Uh...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I want to know everything! I need details! What
are these charms of mine?! Where are they?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Why are you asking me?! Ask the trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess certainly has big dreams for
the future. I feel certain that she has what it takes
to find her perfect prince someday.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Wow! I've never thought about that!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I can't really picture it, but a princess should
always be open-minded!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I'd love to try being a prince at least once!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
So I'll need your help, King. Let's walk down the
aisle together!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...What?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'd like you to be there for my royal debut as a
princess—no—as a prince!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: F-fine! Just put your fists away!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Ohoho, one day I'll be a princess walking like this
beside my prince. ♪

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, so in the end, you're a princess. Well, that
role does suit you better.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess certainly has big dreams for
the future. I feel certain that she has what it takes
to find her perfect prince someday.
